title: Testing Procedure of Three Phase Transformer
author: Md Fazlul Haque
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The transformer plays an important role in the electrical generation, transmission, and distribution systems. Therefore, the entire generation, transmission, and distribution systems will be impacted if the transformer is not operating properly. Therefore, we must conduct some tests to determine the transformer's overall health.
